hero.title: Learn English with Confidence
hero.subtitle: Certified English teacher with a personalized approach to help you achieve your language goals

about.title: About Me
about.description: Hi! My name is Kate. I'm a certified English teacher, graduated from Gomel State University (F. Skorina). My teaching experience and personalized approach help students of all levels achieve their goals — from everyday conversation to exam preparation.

method.title: How I Teach
method.conversationDesc: Build fluency through real-life dialogues and discussions on topics that interest you
method.grammarDesc: Master English grammar with clear explanations and practical exercises
method.examsDesc: Focused preparation for IELTS, TOEFL, and other international exams

pricing.title: Lesson Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your goals

cta.title: Ready to Start Your English Journey?
cta.subtitle: Book your first lesson today — the first trial lesson is free!
